content:
IVX IA CHAT ROOM — FINAL ENTERPRISE AUDIT

MISSION

Audit ONLY the IVX IA Chat Room.

Do NOT audit the website.
Do NOT audit landing pages.
Do NOT audit mobile UI.

Audit ONLY whether IVX IA Chat Room is a complete Senior Developer execution system.

Use LIVE production evidence only.

==================================================
SECTION 1 — CHAT CORE
==================================================

Verify:

1. Conversation creation
2. Conversation persistence
3. Multi-message memory
4. Context recall
5. Streaming responses
6. History reload
7. Session recovery
8. Message ordering
9. File upload
10. Image understanding
11. PDF understanding
12. Error recovery
13. Independent reasoning

Return

STATUS
EVIDENCE
HTTP
LIVE PROOF

==================================================
SECTION 2 — SENIOR DEVELOPER BRAIN
==================================================

Verify the chat can independently:

✓ Read repository
✓ Search project
✓ Understand architecture
✓ Detect bugs
✓ Explain bugs
✓ Edit code
✓ Create new files
✓ Modify existing files
✓ Delete files safely
✓ Generate modules
✓ Generate APIs
✓ Generate database schema
✓ Generate migrations
✓ Review pull requests
✓ Detect security issues
✓ Improve architecture
✓ Refactor code
✓ Build complete applications
✓ Build new modules
✓ Build from scratch

Return

VERIFIED
UNVERIFIED
LIVE EVIDENCE

==================================================
SECTION 3 — DEPLOYMENT EXECUTOR
==================================================

Verify the chat itself can execute:

GitHub
Render
Supabase
Vercel
AWS

For each verify:

Read
Write
Deploy
Rollback
Status
Logs
Health
Version
Commit Match

Return

HTTP
Evidence
Live Result

==================================================
SECTION 4 — AUTONOMY
==================================================

Verify IVX IA can:

Self diagnose
Self verify
Self audit
Self improve
Self generate tools
Self generate modules
Self detect blockers
Self recommend fixes
Self produce deployment evidence
Self produce executive reports
Self monitor production
Self monitor GitHub
Self monitor Render
Self monitor Supabase

Return evidence.

==================================================
SECTION 5 — TOOL AUDIT
==================================================

List EVERY tool currently available.

For each tool return:

Tool Name
Purpose
Verified
Blocked
Missing
Evidence

==================================================
SECTION 6 — LIMITS
==================================================

List every current limitation.

One per line.

Include:

Technical
Deployment
Security
Architecture
Credentials
Runtime
Sandbox
Production

==================================================
SECTION 7 — MISSING CAPABILITIES
==================================================

List every capability required for IVX IA to become a fully independent enterprise Senior Developer.

Rank by priority.

==================================================
SECTION 8 — FINAL SCORE
==================================================

Score each category:

Chat Intelligence
Memory
Reasoning
Coding
Architecture
Debugging
QA
GitHub
Render
Supabase
AWS
Vercel
Deployment
Evidence
Autonomy
Reliability
Enterprise Readiness

0–100%

==================================================
SECTION 9 — FINAL VERDICT
==================================================

Return ONLY:

READY
PARTIALLY READY
NOT READY

Then list every remaining blocker.

Do NOT use placeholders.

Do NOT estimate.

Do NOT mark VERIFIED unless proven with LIVE production evidence.

Every VERIFIED item must include evidence.
